reviews.comment:

Croissants, both sides, are a classic! It's impossible not to take at least a dozen.

reviews.comment:
La estación de servicio resultó muy bien, buena atención y sanitarios muy limpios; pero compramos para llevar,  1/2 docena de medialunas, a un precio astronómico,  no volveremos a comprar.

(Translated by Google)
The service station was very good, with good service and very clean restrooms; but we bought half a dozen croissants to take away, at an astronomical price, we will not buy again.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNaOV9ubU93EAE
